text:
On 10/25/13 14:48, Gary Palmer wrote:
> try deleting the currently installed version and installing the new
> version from the port.  I can't remember the exact error I got recently,
> however I had a similar error and I beleive that's how I fixed it.
>
> I am on 9.1-RELEASE-p7 on amd64.
>

That seemed to do it, thank you Gary.

-- 
Yours in Christ,

Joseph A Nagy Jr
"Whoever loves instruction loves knowledge, But he who hates correction
is stupid." -- Proverbs 12:1
Emails are not formal business letters, whatever businesses may want.
